'''dhanguru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobie|dobie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobie|dobie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhanguru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhængirith|dhængirith]] || [[word:dhængirij|dhængirij]] || [[word:dhængirish|dhængirish]] || [[word:dhængiri|dhængiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhangunguruth|dhangunguruth]] || [[word:dhangunguruj|dhangunguruj]] || [[word:dhangungurush|dhangungurush]] || [[word:dhangunguru|dhangunguru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhanguruth|dhanguruth]] || [[word:dhanguruj|dhanguruj]] || [[word:dhangurush|dhangurush]] || [[word:dhanguru|dhanguru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhangufruth|dhangufruth]] || [[word:dhangufruj|dhangufruj]] || [[word:dhangufrush|dhangufrush]] || [[word:dhangufruf|dhangufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhanguruthu|dhanguruthu]] || [[word:dhanguruju|dhanguruju]] || [[word:dhangurushu|dhangurushu]] || [[word:dhanguruku|dhanguruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhanguruth|dhanguruth]] || [[word:dhanguruj|dhanguruj]] || [[word:dhangurush|dhangurush]] || [[word:dhanguru|dhanguru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhanguruthul|dhanguruthul]] || [[word:dhangurujul|dhangurujul]] || [[word:dhangurushul|dhangurushul]] || [[word:dhangurukul|dhangurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhanguruthuthu|dhanguruthuthu]] || [[word:dhangurujuju|dhangurujuju]] || [[word:dhangurushushu|dhangurushushu]] || [[word:dhanguruku|dhanguruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhanguruthun|dhanguruthun]] || [[word:dhangurujun|dhangurujun]] || [[word:dhangurushun|dhangurushun]] || [[word:dhangurukun|dhangurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhanguruthuoro|dhanguruthuoro]] || [[word:dhangurujuoro|dhangurujuoro]] || [[word:dhangurushuoro|dhangurushuoro]] || [[word:dhangurukuoro|dhangurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
